name: Dark
tagline: Manipulate darkness and shadow to blind and conceal.

baseAbility.name: Darkness
baseAbility.description: Standard action, medium range. Create a sphere of darkness (radius scales with CL) that drops light by two steps (bright light becomes dim, normal/dim light becomes pitch black); creatures with darkvision see through it normally. Lasts while you concentrate, or spend 1 SP for 1 min/CL without concentrating. You also know a basic meld: touch a creature to grant it darkvision for the duration.

talents.name: Cloaking Darkness
talents.description: Grants a (meld) option: touched creature gains concealment while inside darkness you created.

talents.name: Blot
talents.description: Create your darkness as a 2D pool on a surface (a blot) instead of a 3D volume; anything touching the blot is affected.

talents.name: Shadow Lurk
talents.description: A (shadow) option: manipulate a target's own shadow directly, without needing an area of darkness at all.

talents.name: Fearful Darkness
talents.description: A (darkness) add-on: creatures that start their turn in your darkness must save or be shaken.

talents.name: Clinging Darkness
talents.description: Center your darkness/blot on a creature or object instead of a fixed point, so it moves with the target.

talents.name: Rolling Blackout
talents.description: Move an existing area of darkness you created as a move action instead of leaving it fixed in place.

talents.name: Lingering Darkness
talents.description: Darkness persists for a while after you stop concentrating on it.

talents.name: Gaze Into the Abyss
talents.description: Anyone trying to magically scry or divine a creature/object protected by your darkness must beat your MSD or be stunned and learn nothing.

talents.name: Shadowed Mien
talents.description: A (meld) option granting protection from and resistance to light/vision-based effects, useful for creatures vulnerable to daylight.

talents.name: Expanded Darkness
talents.description: Increase the radius of your darkness or blot.
